description: CI Recheck agent step schemas. Closure emits verdict in {green, red, timeout, still-running} for outputPhases routing (workflow-merge.json). still-running falls back via fallbackPhase=ci-pending (Retry Loop, 07_flow_design.md §3.2).

closure.recheck.description: CI recheck closure response — observe CI status, post a recheck comment, emit a verdict that routes phase transition.

summary.description: One-line human-readable summary of the observed CI state.

action.description: Closure intent. Always 'closing' for single-iteration ci-recheck.

verdict.description: Verdict propagated to orchestrator. 'green' = all required checks passed → merge-ready. 'red' = any required check failed → merge-blocked. 'timeout' = CI did not converge within budget → merge-blocked. 'still-running' = CI still pending → fallbackPhase=ci-pending (Retry Loop).

comment_body.description: Body of the timestamped recheck comment posted to the PR. MUST be non-empty so R5 (state-mutating return-flow) is satisfied even on still-running verdict.
